description: SimpleStruct demonstrates a basic struct with primitive fields. Each field can have its own documentation which will be included in the schema.

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this struct. This comment will be included in the schema description for this field.

name.description: Name is the display name. Multiline comments are supported and will be preserved in the schema.

score.description: Score is a numerical value between 0 and 100.

tags.description: Tags are additional metadata for this struct.
